Message: docs(Worker): Add Security, Compatibility, License, and Changelog sections to README Expand the Worker README with four new documentation sections: **Security** — document the multi-layer security architecture: Trusted Types enforcement via the `WorkerApplication` policy, auth token encryption, CSP compliance, scope isolation to `/Application` paths, and build-time sealing of environment variables. **Compatibility** — tabulate integration points with sister elements (Sky, Wind, Cocoon) and the Tauri WebView runtime, clarifying how Worker interacts with each. **License** and **Changelog** — restore license notice and changelog reference as standalone sections with direct links to the project repository files. Also clean up the Mermaid diagram labels by removing em-quad spacing characters between text and emoji markers, and add the `title` attribute to the Star badge `` element for accessibility compliance.
